meaning: 第聂伯河[苏联西部](或译德涅伯河;注入黑海)
examples: But the foraging communities of the cultures in the region of the Don and Dnieper rivers took up stock breeding and began to exploit the neighboring steppes.
The area behind the Dnieper river.
A city of western European U. S. S. R. on the Dnieper River southwest of Moscow.
Ukraine has been traditionally divided into two parts: the East and the West, split, roughly speaking, by the main river Dnieper.
